title: USGS The National Map
description: A USGS source card for maps, elevation, hydrography, boundaries, and geographic data.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: The National Map provides USGS information about elevation, landforms, streams, transportation features, boundaries, and downloadable geographic data.
Use this source for reading contour maps, comparing physical and political geography, and building map-based questions about local places.
USGS map and data products are generally public domain, though linked third-party layers or partner materials may have their own attribution rules.
